titleStmt.title: SII 39.210: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 210. (A.R. No. 210 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. VĪRAPRATĀPA ACHYUTARĀYA MAHĀRĀYA, ŚAKA 1458 (1536 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the poliyūṭṭu gift of the village of Paṭṭālam by Narasammaṅgār, daughter of Gaḍḍam Tirumala Tāttayaṅgār of Kūram, for the supply of food offerings, nāluvagai tirupaṇiyāram and Pānagam to the temple on the occasion of swinging festival.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śvastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran metini miśvarakaṇḍakaṭāri sāḷuva hariyarāyar vipāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuvarāyarakaṇḍan muvarāyar kaṇḍan Irācātirāca rācaparameśvara śrī virapratāpa Accutarāya mahārāyar prativirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam
1000 4 100 5 10 8- l mel cellāniṉṟa dummukhi samvatsarattu mituna nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu sattamiyum Ātitta vāramum peṟṟa Atta nakṣatrattu nāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmalnāṭṭu tāmalkoṭṭattu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi poreṟṟu nayiṉār koyil keḻvi śrī vayiṣṇavaciyarum śrī paṇṭārattārum kūram gaḍḍam ti
rumalai tāttayaṅkār kumārattiyār narasam maṅkārukku poliyūṭu sāsanam kuṭuttapaṭi tammiṭa poliyūṭṭāṉa tiruvūñcal tirunāḷ Eḻukkum tinacciṟappu nāḷ Oṉṟukkut taḷikai nālukkum tām koṇṭu viṭṭa śrī grāmam paṭṭālam grāmamoṉṟum śrī paṇṭāratattile Āṇṭu koṇṭu Inta grāmattil Uṟpanam koṇṭu tiruvuñcal tiruṉāḷeḻukkum ṉāḷ
Oṉṟukkum ciṟappukku yirupattunālu taḷikaiyum nāluvakai tiruppaṇiyāramum pānakamum Amutuceyyak kaṭavārākavum tinacciṟappu nāḷ Oṉṟukku nālu taḷikai Amutu ceyyak kaṭavarākavum yitil viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu tamakku nālil Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oru taḷikaiyum tirunāḷ Eḻukkum nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai Āṟum tiruppaṇiyāram pānakkam nāliloṉṟum sannadhi tiruvitiyil
Digital edition of SII 39.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
